feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC Forecast chart feature seems missing
entry.content:
Hello community.

I have a question about finding the forecast add-in in a time series chart. With the previous version of SAC stories I could locate it in the "3 dot" menu of the chart, in the "Add" section.

But in the new optimized version I wasn't able to find it anywhere. Did anyone from the community fased a similar issue? How can I solve it? 

Thank you in advance 

 

#SAP #SAC#Forecast

entry.title: Unable to join groups in SAP community
entry.content:
Hi,

My friend has been trying to join groups in SAP Community but he gets this error message

Is there any solution?

Regards,

Tri

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud - Configuring Forms in Content Studio with dependencies
entry.content:
Hello SAP community

If we are using a form in SAP Content Studio, we don't see any possibility to hide the following (input)field in a form, depending on the chosen value of the previous one.

Example: IF Country is chosen USA, than show field Region, otherwise hide it.

Is this per design or are we missing something important here? We thought we may can work around it while enhancing with css, but also did not succeed.

The only work-around we see at the moment is to work with restricted values on the following field (what would work as long as these two fields have a data dependency).

Many thanks for a good hint!

Best regards, Stefan

entry.title: OM Hierarchy
entry.content:
I was assigned the task of creating a hierarchy where the Finance Manager is at the top, supervising the Assistant Finance Manager, and subsequently, the Finance Manager is the line supervisor of the Finance Officer. I have created the positions and defined the relationships accordingly, but the Finance Officer is not appearing in the reporting structure.

Spoiler

entry.title: Insert data using table control ( ABAP )
entry.content:
Guys I desperately need your help.  I have a table control ( Using wizard) to input data to a custom table and some functions similar to vba1. 

The thing is I execute the module pool enter data but It wont work 

I have to click on the insert row button 

But I want to be able to enter data directly. I want it to be like similar to table control in vba1. it is for scrap sale. I am new to abap. so help guys. 

ABAP Development SAP Community

entry.title: Convergent Charging: Recurring Charge not triggered for migrated Provider Contracts
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a issue with BIT generation for migrated Provider Contracts.

In order to set up a testing environment, we took a snapshot of our production system (up to the end of 2022) and migrated it to our test system.  We have synchronized data in our test ERP and our test CC systems.

For Provider Contracts that have recurring Charges, we were expecting the CC Activation job in our test system to bring all the Provider Contracts 'up to date' by triggering the events and generating BITs for the all the recurring charges that became 'due' in the interim period between the end of 2022 and the current date.

So for example, if we had a 3 year contract starting in 2022 where the billing cycle is yearly and payment was due at the beginning of each yearly cycle, there would already be a BIT in the system from the original contract activation (migrated in from production). We expected that when the CC Activation job ran, it would determine that there are 2 yearly events (2023 and 2024) for which BITs need to be generated.  However this is not happening - no BITs are generated.

Our CC Activation job is running daily and for PCs that we create from scratch in the test system it appears to be handling the recurring events correctly. For example I created a PC for which the start Date was several years in the past and when the PC was activated during distribution, ALL of the BITs for prior years were generated correctly.

I checked the Rater, Updater, Dispatcher, Bulkloader Logs and Traces and I see no evidence that the Activation job is picking up these migrated PCs for processing.

Also I tried triggering the Activation job for one of these migrated PCs by sending in a PC activation request via Web Services. It did not work.

Any feedback or suggestions would be appreciated.

Regards,

Paul

 

 

@francois_thimon

entry.title: Define a leading ledger Message no. FAGL_LEDGER_CUST02
entry.content:
Hi experts

I am getting this error when running FBL3N in ECC6

Message: Define a leading ledger Message no. FAGL_LEDGER_CUST023

Please assist me.

Thanks

entry.title: Single invoice for multiple Purchase order for Material and Service
entry.content:
Dear Experts ,

We have the following Requirement : Supplier creates single Invoice against multiple Purchase orders referring to same outline agreement(Contract) approx 500 line material & services items from SAP Business network

Product used by the client : SAP Ariba Commerce Automation.

we have the option of using Summary invoice for this requirement but it has few limitations such as cannot be implemented for Service PO and Summary invoice is done with respect to PO and not with respect to Goods receipt, the client wants to create invoice with respect to GRN . 

Have you come across such a business situation .if yes , how did you deal with it 

Thanks & Regards

Rithvik.R

entry.title: I want to run MRP with WBS element Please Suggest. In Sap s4 public cloud.
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

In sap s4 Hana public cloud I want to run MRP with WBS element wise . So as I Search many Fiori tiles & t codes for MRP run but I did not find any t code where WBS wise I can run mrp.

entry.title: MIGO Screen custom tab field store MATDOC table
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

As a part of one of my requirements, I need to add custom tab in Material Document screen and a field need to be added inside it and it's an editable field. The field value needs to be stored in MATDOC table.

I have created append structure for MATDOC and an Enhancement Implementation for MB_MIGO_BADI, so I could create the tab and add the editable field in it. The problem is that I need to add the new field value into MATDOC table while posting the document.

I used POST_DOCUMENT method to save the field value into MATDOC. But I can't store the data into table that what I understood is data will be added after posting completed and the method is checking before posting the document. 

I tried to create the CDS view of MSEG and try to proceed, but it won't go as expected.

So I'm requesting expert to provide a solution for this.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Hello team, Requirement is in custom report.
entry.content:
I am calling the VA05 transaction in the report, I want the output in one internal table to proceed further. How to achieve it. Please help on it. 

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Answer text editor strange behavior
entry.content:
Hi,

Every once in a while the text editor, for answering a question, will start behaving strangely.

For example, while typing the caret may jump to the beginning of the line, and everything typed, will continue from there. Placing the caret back at the end of the line, does not help. Press any key, and the caret will jump to the start of the line again. If you place the caret anywhere before the last letter in that line, you can type normally.

Another phenomenon is some sort of weird autocorrect. The following screenshot shows this. Here I was trying to type "Regards,", when I noticed that the editor had all of a sudden changed the text:

 

On the few occasions that this happens, closing and reopening the page and/or browser, will solve the problem.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: AFO Tabs Not Recognizing Connection to BW - Seeking Assistance
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am assisting a user who is encountering an issue with SAP Analysis for Office (AFO) where the tabs do not appear to recognize that they are AFO tabs, and are supposed to be connecting to BW.

The issue still exists even after following the steps to manually establish connections, which can be found here: Most common issues with Analysis for Office 2.8 SP... - SAP Community

After attempting to manually connect, the sources now show up in the Analysis window, which wasn't the case previously, but the data doesn't act like AFO data should. Double-clicking on the data, for example, does not initiate the standard drill-down or filtering functions.

We've tried rearranging the tabs, but it only fixes part of the problem. It appears that the information is not fully represented as AFO data. Has anyone else encountered this problem before, or does anyone know how to fix it?

 

Any help or guidance on this issue would be greatly appreciated.

 

Thank you,

Liz M

 

#SAP #SAP AFO

entry.title: Unable to trigger the iflow in SAP CPI free trail account
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am learning SAP CPI by doing some POCs in SAP CPI free trail account while doing POCs unable to trigger the Iflow through postman and I gave all the correct configuration detail and also selected basic auth in postman and I gave correct credential still I am getting 401 unauthorization error.

Please let me know where I went wrong and what might be the reason for getting this 401 unauthorization error.

For SAP CPI free trail account are there any limitations ? I gave all the correct user roles. 

Regards,

Gopi

entry.title: Career Change at 38: Is SAP the Right Path?
Spring 6 Support
entry.content:
Hi,

Does anyone know when SAP Commerce is going to include Spring 6 support?

Currently, in our 2211.24 setup, I can see Spring 5.3 libraries are used: hybris\bin\platform\ext\core\lib

Thanks,

Sarbajeet

entry.title: sap log showing out of memory
entry.content:
Hi,
While checking for the AR Invoice logs there was an error showing "out of memory".
Can anyone help me to figure out the solution.
Do we need to upgrade it to sap 64bit or can we run on the same ?

Thank you

entry.title: how we can fetch first and last day of a given month by referring incoming payload
entry.content:
Hi All,

i hope you're doing well.

i have a requirement that from source we will get 3 letter of a month , by that we need make calucate first and last day of the month in the format yyyyMMdd . i have tried multiple way but no luck. can you please here.

source we will get in XML format.

Thanks in-advance.

BR,

Reddy

entry.title: Migration Cockpit - Direct Transfer - BOMs with History with effectivity parameter
entry.content:
Dear community,

We're currently migration BOMs from ECC to S/4 HANA and we're facing the following challenge for lots of BOMs. The method CNV_PE_S4_PP_MATERIAL_BOM_ECN doesn't consider changes in positions with ECN numbers with effectivity parameters. These positions are migrated but as new positions instead of as modifications of the same position.

In the source system

In the target system.

entry.title: Linking Dimensions across different models to pick the current master data status
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Planning, we have a requirement to fetch the store status based on the date filtered in the story.

In the below example, Store A is under renovation for Period 1 of 2024 to Period 3 of 2024
Store B is closed in Period 4
Store C was Already Open
Store D is a new store opened in Period 2 of 2024.

User will maintain the data in a custom table

 


Hence, the requirement is that lets assume we are in period 9 of the 2024.

If a person runs the period filter in the dashboard from Period 1 to Period 4, the below store status should be visible in the table, based on the data mentioned in the table

StoreStatus
ARenovation
BClosed
COpen
DNew

In the transaction data being sent to SAC, we have the store code & the posting date being sent.

We do not want to load this store status on the transactional data, since business might change the store status for backdated dates.

E.g., in July 2024, they might change the status of a store of Jan 2024.

Hence, based on the data in the table, we want the system to use a similar formula like VLOOKUP, where system would pick the status mentioned in the above table based on the store code & the period combination.

@N1kh1l if you could please provide any inputs in achieving this.

 

Regards,

Gavin.
